quintile_degeneracy.note: fund_24h ties at the exchange default funding rate: the 60th and 80th pct edges coincide, so the interior quintile between them is empty (collapsed). The gradient/verdict do not depend on quintile bins (they use per-trade Spearman + the ±3bps extreme cuts); the collapsed bin is simply omitted from the zone table, documented here rather than silently dropped.
